name: Bijou DevTools Inspector
requirements: Sub-App Composition (to run the inspector as a sub-app)

userStory.iWant: an in-app inspector for my TUI
userStory.soThat: I can see the live state, message history, and layout boxes without leaving the terminal.

acceptanceCriteria: Toggleable overlay (F12) that doesn't disrupt the main app
Live tree-view of the current TEA Model
Searchable and filterable history of all BusMsgs
Layout inspector that highlights component boxes on hover
backwardCompatibility: Optional dev-only dependency; zero impact on production builds.

outScope: External browser-based devtools (TUI-native only for now)

testPlan.goldenPath: Open the inspector in a running app. Trigger a message. Verify that the message appears in the devtools log instantly.
edgeCases: Inspector layout interfering with the main app layout
DevTools throwing an error (should not crash the main app)
testPlan.fuzzStress: Spam 10,000 messages and verify that the message log remains responsive with virtualization.

estimatedComplexity.timeComplexity: O(N) where N is model size
